preserved_evidence: War.gov/local D74 filename/release label is Syria November 2023; embedded PDF title/subject says DoW-UAP-D42
implication: Use D74 filename/release identity and body content as working identity; retain D42 metadata as a caveat.

preserved_evidence: Initial contact and DoD acquisition date are 092153:00ZNOV23; event serial is 092153ZNOV2023-CENTCOM
Operation INHERENT RESOLVE; USCENTCOM / 609th; air ISR mission with FMV/SIGINT collection during tasking
implication: The UAP belongs to a Syria ISR mission, not a standalone media release.

preserved_evidence: Narrative has RTB at 1933Z, while UAP gentext says the event happened while RTB at 2153Z; handback and landing follow at 2254Z and 2319Z
implication: Anchor analysis on the repeated UAP time 092153:00ZNOV23 and treat RTB wording as mission-phase context.

preserved_evidence: ISR sections list FMV as primary sensor, but no raw UAP video, frame stills, FOV, range, or telemetry are public
implication: Do not treat D74 as a public video-evidence case.

preserved_evidence: Friendly aircraft, first coordinate, and last coordinate preserve redacted MGRS-style 37S/37D coordinate lanes
implication: Supports Syria theater analysis but not exact geolocation.

preserved_evidence: Narrative reports the object came from the south near co-altitude, dropped altitude, safely passed the aircraft, and became out of range after about seven minutes
implication: Supports a pass-geometry lane, not a precise kinematic reconstruction.

preserved_evidence: Kinetic velocity is 424KN with estimated accuracy; narrative says it maintained about 424KN
implication: Do not independently validate or compare physical speed without source imagery and telemetry.

preserved_evidence: Gentext describes a probable UAP shaped like a bouncy ball; structured description field is mostly redacted after SHOWED AS
implication: Use the shape language only as a report narrative claim, not as image-verified morphology.

preserved_evidence: Observer assessment benign; no emissions, interrogation, engagement, equipment/person effects, or recovered material; under intelligent control marked NO
implication: Supports unresolved benign observation lane; does not close conventional explanations.

preserved_evidence: No public/local PR or DVIDS pairing found for D74, 092153ZNOV2023-CENTCOM, 424KN, or bouncy-ball anchors
implication: Keep D74 document-only unless new official source metadata appears.
